-Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--enable-new-dtags
